ddls:
CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_number" INTEGER /* Season number */,
  "broadcast_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "broadcast_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "story_id" INTEGER /* ID of the story the episode belongs to */,
  "serial" INTEGER /* Serial number of the episode */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the episode */,
  "production_code" TEXT /* Production code for the episode */,
  "original_air_date" TEXT /* Original air date of the episode */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the episode belongs to */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* Episode number within the season */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the episode in minutes */,
  "viewers" INTEGER /* Viewers for the episode */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_story_id FOREIGN KEY ("story_id") REFERENCES stories ("story_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stories" (
  "story_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each story */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the story */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the story */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the story */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("story_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode being rated */,
  "uk_viewers" REAL /* UK viewership numbers for the episode */,
  "ai_score" REAL /* AI score for the episode */,
  "BBC_rating" REAL /* BBC rating for the episode */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the director */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the director */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "writers" (
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each writer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the writer */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the writer */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the writer */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the writer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_directors" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id", "director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_writers" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode */,
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the writer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id", "writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the actor */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the actor */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_actors" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id", "actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, viewer) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the episode */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the episode was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the episode was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings_history" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode being rated */,
  "uk_viewers" REAL /* UK viewership numbers for the episode */,
  "ai_score" REAL /* AI score for the episode */,
  "BBC_rating" REAL /* BBC rating for the episode */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was updated */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time when the rating was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_history_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_teams" (
  "production_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production team */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode the team worked on */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the production team */,
  "team_leader" TEXT /* Name of the team leader */,
  "team_members" TEXT /* Names of the team members */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_teams_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)
